title: mentha × concinna
intro: Mentha × concinna, also known as pineapple mint, is a hybrid plant derived from the cross between Mentha suaveolens and Mentha × piperita. It possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been utilized in traditional herbal remedies. The health benefits of Mentha × concinna include relieving digestive issues, reducing nausea, and providing relief from headaches. The plant's leaves can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are commonly used in aromatherapy and culinary applications.
